fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Your provider API key. Stored encrypted.

fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: Override the default API endpoint. Leave blank to use the provider default (e.g. for Ollama/OpenWebUI: http://host.docker.internal:3000).

fields.label: Default Model
fields.description: e.g. gpt-4o-mini, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, gemini-2.0-flash-lite, qwen2.5. Leave blank to use the provider default.

fields.label: Fallback Model
fields.description: If the default model fails, retry with this model. Leave blank to disable fallback.

fields.label: Fallback Base URL
fields.description: Override the API endpoint for the fallback model. Leave blank to use the provider default.

fields.label: Fallback Model API Key
fields.description: API key for the fallback model if it uses a different provider or key. Leave blank to reuse the main API Key.

fields.label: Second Fallback Model
fields.description: Model for second fallback (e.g. qwen2.5 for Ollama).

fields.label: Second Fallback Base URL
fields.description: API endpoint for second fallback (e.g. http://100.88.116.94:11434/v1/chat/completions for Ollama via Tailscale).

fields.label: Second Fallback API Key
fields.description: Leave blank to reuse the main API key.

fields.label: System Prompt
fields.description: The AI's personality and instructions. Leave blank to use the built-in default prompt.
